title: Off-Hours Login
author: Detection Engineering Team
description: Detects successful authentication events occurring between midnight and 05:00, outside normal business hours. Adversaries use valid credentials during off-hours to reduce detection likelihood.
false_positive_notes: Legitimate remote workers in different time zones. Scheduled automated tasks running as user accounts. On-call engineers responding to incidents. Tune by user role and known timezone.
severity_rationale: MEDIUM because the credential itself is valid. Suspicious timing alone does not confirm malicious intent but warrants investigation.
